functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Great White Guide
pages:
Great White Guide

A Choascraft guide for great white shark facts, taming, riding, drops, and gear.

Fact 1

Sharks are fish with cartilage skeletons instead of heavy bones.

Fact 2

Great white sharks are large ocean predators with strong jaws and triangular teeth.

Fact 3

They often hunt by surprising prey from below with a fast upward burst.

Fact 4

Great whites can sense tiny electrical signals made by nearby animals.

Fact 5

Their teeth are serrated, which helps them cut into large prey.

Fact 6

Great whites are warm-bodied compared with many fish, helping them stay active in cooler water.

Fact 7

Young great whites often eat fish, while adults may hunt larger prey.

Fact 8

Great whites help balance ocean food webs by hunting weak, injured, or abundant animals.

Choascraft Great Whites

Great white sharks spawn alone in non-frozen oceans. Adults have 60 health and hit hard.

Wild Hunters

A rare wild great white can spawn as a player hunter. It will not hunt players while a player is riding it.

Taming

Great white sharks can be tamed with cod, salmon, or tropical fish.

Riding

Tamed sharks can be saddled and ridden. Saddled sharks give water breathing while mounted.

Storage

Tamed sharks can accept chests, giving them storage for long ocean trips.

Breeding

Tamed sharks breed with salmon. Baby sharks grow over time and follow nearby parents.

Drops

Sharks can drop Shark Meat, Shark Tooth, Shark Fin, Shark Hide, and the rare Shark Eye.

Cooking

Shark Meat can be cooked in a furnace, smoker, or campfire to make Cooked Shark Meat.

Crafting Key

I = Iron Ingot
T = Shark Tooth
F = Shark Fin
H = Shark Hide
E = Shark Eye
. = empty slot

Shark Sword

Pattern:
.T.
FIH
.E.

Result: Greatwhite Shark Sword

Shark Helmet

III
ITI
TET

Result: Greatwhite Shark Helmet

Shark Chestplate

Pattern:
IEI
FHF
III

Result: Greatwhite Shark Chestplate

Shark Leggings

Pattern:
III
IEI
IHI

Result: Greatwhite Shark Leggings

Shark Boots

Pattern:
IFI
IFI
ITI

Result: Greatwhite Shark Boots

Netherite Shark Gear

Use a smithing table with a netherite upgrade template, shark gear, and a netherite ingot.

Captain Note

If a shark is yours, saddle it. If it is not yours, watch the water and keep moving.
